MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Betty Walker in pro per, Plaintiff/Respondent with witness Edward Falwer

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Stipulation to pro tem judge signed. The parties were sworn and testified.

After presented oral and documentary evidence to the court. At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.
